changes.description: Major rewrite: Added explicit JSON output format schemas for all 3 task types (parse-rss, multi-feed-digest, summarize-articles). Specified categories must be an array not an object. Added Python xml.etree parsing example. Removed voice summary and irrelevant content.
Added guidance to fetch feeds individually or in parallel to avoid command timeouts. Added bash example with background curl processes and wait.
Added emphasis on including every article from every feed without dropping any. Added note about not truncating descriptions.
Strengthened highlights guidance: must include stories from at least 3 different categories. Updated example highlights to show one from each feed category.

notes: multi-feed-digest was the main optimization target. Baseline failed 'all-feeds' test because model used categories as nested object instead of array. Also had timeout issues from sequential feed fetching and article count issues from dropping stories. summarize-articles and parse-rss were consistently 100 (one 94 outlier due to model variance in key_numbers context labels).
